name: First State Bank And Trust
description_short: Full-service bank offering checking, savings, lending, and investment services to personal, business, and agricultural customers across Kansas.
description_long:
First State Bank & Trust is a traditional community bank operating primarily in Kansas with a comprehensive range of financial services. The bank was established to serve personal, business, and agricultural customers with deposit products, lending solutions, and wealth management services.

The bank offers an extensive suite of deposit products including checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, and certificates of deposit. On the lending side, they provide personal loans, auto loans, real estate loans, commercial loans, commercial real estate loans, business credit cards, and specialized agricultural lending including livestock loans and equipment financing. They also offer trust administration, estate administration, wealth management, and investment management services through their Investments & Trust division.

First State Bank & Trust distinguishes itself through specialized agricultural lending programs (Ag loans, Ag real estate, livestock, equipment financing) and a dedicated focus on business lending with commercial loan options and merchant services. They emphasize digital banking convenience with mobile banking apps, online banking, mobile deposit, bill pay, and Zelle integration. The bank employs a team-based approach with named lending officers for personal, consumer, commercial, and agricultural divisions.

As a traditional brick-and-mortar bank, First State Bank & Trust is best suited for customers seeking relationship-based banking with local branch access and personalized lending services. The main limitation is that as a regional Kansas bank, their services and branch network are geographically restricted, and they may not offer the digital-first convenience or rates that online-only banks provide.
services: Money market accounts and certificates of deposit
Real estate loans and mortgage lending
Commercial loans and commercial real estate loans
Agricultural loans including livestock and equipment financing
Wealth management and investment management services
Business credit cards and debit cards with Card Suite Lite controls
Mobile banking app and online banking platform
Mobile deposit and bill pay services
pros: Comprehensive lending options including specialized agricultural loans (livestock, equipment, operating loans) for farm customers
Multi-channel digital access: mobile banking app, online banking, mobile deposit, bill pay, and Zelle integration
Personal lending officers assigned to consumer, business, and agricultural segments for relationship-based service
Trust and investment services including estate administration, wealth management, and IRA rollovers in-house
Business banking solutions with cash management, business bill pay, merchant services, and commercial lending
Card Suite Lite debit card controls allowing customers to manage card usage restrictions remotely
Ability to open accounts online for existing and new customers with convenient digital onboarding
cons: Geographic limitation as a Kansas-based regional bank with restricted branch network and service area
Website does not prominently display current APR ranges, fee schedules, or rate competitiveness for comparison
No mention of specialized products like reverse mortgages or jumbo loan programs for high-net-worth customers
Limited information about mobile app features, functionality, or user ratings and reviews available on website
No prominent educational content or financial literacy resources beyond basic calculators and fraud prevention
best_for: Kansas-based agricultural customers needing specialized farm loans, equipment financing, and livestock lending
Small business owners seeking relationship banking with dedicated commercial lending officers and merchant services
Customers wanting integrated trust and investment services with wealth management and estate planning
Personal and business customers preferring local branch access and relationship-based banking over online-only banks
diagnosis: First State Bank & Trust is best for Kansas residents and agricultural customers seeking comprehensive relationship banking with specialized farm lending and trust services. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to Kansas operations and lack of transparent rate/fee information online, making rate comparison with competitors difficult.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
